description: Add bulk 'Ekstraksi Semua Sertifikat' and 'Translate Semua' buttons to the candidates page. These buttons work on selected candidates (or all if none selected), calling the extract-cert-date API and translateHelper respectively, updating Firestore, and showing progress.
steps: In src/app/admin/candidates/page.js, add import for updateDoc from firebase/firestore (already has doc imported)
Add state variables: extractingAll (boolean), translatingAll (boolean), bulkProgress (string for showing X/Y progress)

Add a handleBulkExtract async function that: determines target candidates (selected ones if any, otherwise all filtered), iterates over each candidate checking for cert links (sertifikatBahasaJepang, sertifikatSSW, sertifikatSenmonkyuu), calls /api/extract-cert-date for each link, updates Firestore doc with extracted dates (tanggalJFT, tanggalSSW, tanggalSSWKaigo for KAIGO, tanggalShuryoShomei), updates progress state showing current/total

Add a handleBulkTranslate async function that: determines target candidates (selected ones if any, otherwise all filtered), for each candidate translates TRANSLATABLE_FIELDS (kelebihan, kekurangan, alasanKeJepang, alasanMelamarBidang, alasanKaigofukushishi, impianMasaDepan) using translateToJapanese(), saves translations to Firestore under candidate.translations object, updates progress state

Add two buttons in the header area (near existing delete/reset buttons) visible only to admin role: 'Ekstraksi Semua Sertifikat' (green themed) and 'Translate Semua' (purple themed). Show progress text next to them when running.
Add a progress banner/bar below the header that shows bulkProgress text when extractingAll or translatingAll is true
acceptance_criteria: The candidates page shows 'Ekstraksi Semua Sertifikat' and 'Translate Semua' buttons for admin users
Clicking 'Ekstraksi Semua Sertifikat' processes selected candidates (or all if none selected) and shows progress like 'Mengekstrak sertifikat... 3/10'
Clicking 'Translate Semua' processes selected candidates (or all if none selected) and shows progress like 'Menerjemahkan... 5/10'
Both buttons are disabled while processing
Firestore documents are updated with extracted dates and translations respectively
npm run build completes without errors
verification: Run `npm run build` and confirm no compilation errors
findings: Build passes cleanly. Addressed review issues #1, #4, #5: added window.confirm before both bulk operations, tracked success/fail counts with summary display after completion, and added 500ms delay between translateToJapanese calls within each candidate. Also added a dismissable green summary banner that shows after operations complete.
